inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $793.909M ÷ 341.023566M shares; total revenue $3224.412M and provision for credit losses $616.683M (AFRM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20250828_rpt20250630_acc0001820953_25_000080.htm)
inputs.normalization_note: Affirm consolidates merchant network fees and interest income on loans; Lawrence base uses FY2025 operating cash flow per share, not GAAP net income alone. Securitization funding debt is reserved separately from corporate liquidity.

bear.notes: Credit recession, higher funding spreads, merchant take-rate pressure

base.notes: Continued GMV growth with stable credit losses; OCF normalized off FY2025

bull.notes: Affirm Card and wallet scale; funding cost advantage persists

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Loan receivables marked at amortized cost; merchant relationships not capitalized

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant assets?
option_scan.evidence: Operating BNPL platform; no land or royalty pattern

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: FY2025 operating income $1.20B and net income $985M (10-K)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Affirm Card and wallet expansion modeled in wallet_and_card_option component

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No special dividend or litigation recovery catalyst

growth_explanation.mechanism: Gross merchandise volume drives merchant network revenue and loan originations; interest income scales with receivables while funding costs and credit losses determine owner cash conversion.

falsifiers.trigger: Provision for credit losses exceeds 25% of total revenue for two consecutive quarters
Weighted-average funding cost rises more than 200 bps YoY while GMV growth slows below 5%

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map platform owner cash, wallet/card option, net corporate liquidity, and credit/funding stress reserve once each.

components.label: BNPL platform owner cash (merchant network and interest economics)

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AFRM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20250828_rpt20250630_acc0001820953_25_000080.htm: FY2025 revenue $3224.412M, OCF $793.909M, provision $616.683M; AFRM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260507_rpt20260331_acc0001628280_26_032294.htm: cash $1723.413M, corporate debt $1128.617M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q3 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 net cash from operating activities

assumptions.label: Normalized owner cash per diluted share (OCF proxy)
assumptions.rationale: FY2025 operating cash flow per share anchors platform economics; interest income and merchant fees flow through consolidated OCF after loan-loss and funding cash effects.

assumptions.label: Duration-adjusted owner-cash capitalization multiple
assumptions.rationale: Bear stresses credit losses and funding spreads; base mid-cycle seven-year path; bull modest share gains without peak-cycle heroics.

components.label: Affirm Card, debit, and consumer wallet expansion

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AFRM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20250828_rpt20250630_acc0001820953_25_000080.htm: FY2025 revenue $3224.412M, OCF $793.909M, provision $616.683M; AFRM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260507_rpt20260331_acc0001628280_26_032294.htm: cash $1723.413M, corporate debt $1128.617M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.

valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 merchant network and platform revenue
Q3 FY2026 YTD weighted-average diluted shares

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted Affirm Card, debit, and wallet expansion value
assumptions.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on deeper consumer wallet, Affirm Card, and repeat-transaction economics not fully captured in normalized OCF multiple; base is bounded judgment pending standalone segment disclosure.

calculations.label: Wallet and card option per share

components.label: Net parent cash less corporate and revolving debt

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AFRM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20250828_rpt20250630_acc0001820953_25_000080.htm: FY2025 revenue $3224.412M, OCF $793.909M, provision $616.683M; AFRM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260507_rpt20260331_acc0001628280_26_032294.htm: cash $1723.413M, corporate debt $1128.617M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.

inputs.label: Corporate and revolving long-term debt (ex-securitization trusts)

source.locator: LongTermDebt corporate/revolving component ~$1,128.617M at March 31, 2026 (10-Q debt note; excludes ~$7.7B securitization trust notes)
Total LongTermDebt $8,873.911M less corporate component; matched to loan receivables funding

assumptions.label: Net corporate liquidity after cash and non-securitization debt
assumptions.rationale: Parent cash less corporate/revolving debt; securitization notes are matched to loan receivables and excluded from this overlap key.

components.label: Credit cycle and securitization funding stress reserve

valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: Total long-term debt including securitization (Q3 FY2026)

assumptions.label: Credit cycle, funding spread, and securitization stress reserve
assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for recession-driven credit losses, higher funding costs, and securitization refinancing risk not fully embedded in the owner-cash multiple.

calculations.label: Credit and funding stress reserve per share

validation_errors: option component wallet_and_card_option requires probability, timing, and remaining-capital treatment

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: BNPL platform owner cash (merchant network and interest economics)
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

items.label: Affirm Card, debit, and consumer wallet expansion
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Affirm Card, debit, and consumer wallet expansion
Credit cycle and securitization funding stress reserve
BNPL platform owner cash (merchant network and interest economics)
Net parent cash less corporate and revolving debt

source_lineage.locator: LongTermDebt corporate/revolving component ~$1,128.617M at March 31, 2026 (10-Q debt note; excludes ~$7.7B securitization trust notes)
Total LongTermDebt $8,873.911M less corporate component; matched to loan receivables funding

blockers: option component wallet_and_card_option requires probability, timing, and remaining-capital treatment
validation_errors: option component wallet_and_card_option requires probability, timing, and remaining-capital treatment

falsifiers: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
